data.title: Walgreens Boots Alliance Stock Jumps On Better Than Expected Q1 Earnings, Sticks To Annual Profit Forecast
data.description: Walgreens Q1 FY2025 sales hit $39.46B, with strong growth in healthcare and pharmacy segments despite retail sales declines. EPS guidance remains intact.

data.title: Match Group, Bumble's Growth Stalls: Analyst Warns Of Challenging 2025
data.description: The online dating industry faces stagnation due to lack of innovation and waning interest among younger users. Match Group and Bumble Inc. are struggling to turnaround, with potential for industry consolidation and AI-driven product innovation.

data.title: US Economy Adds 256,000 Payrolls In December, Tight Labor Market Tops Forecasts: Dollar, Treasury Yields Spike
data.description: US labor market ends 2024 strong, adds 256,000 jobs in Dec. Unemployment rate falls to 4.1%. Health care, retail, and gov sectors drive gains.

data.title: Alibaba, Baidu, JD NIO, Li Auto Stocks Slide As Potential AI Chip Sanctions Add Pressure On China
data.description: US-listed Chinese stocks, including Alibaba, Baidu, JD.com, PDD Holdings, NIO, Li Auto, and XPeng, trade lower as US-China tensions rise over AI embargo.
